hero.title: DATING FOR EVERYONE EASY AND FAST

f1.title: Smart Matching
f1.desc: Our smart algorithm analyzes your interests to find the most compatible matches.

f2.title: Secure & Private
f2.desc: Your data is encrypted. Chat only after a mutual match.

f3.title: Real-time Chat
f3.desc: Instant notifications and smooth messaging experience.

f4.title: Shared Interests
f4.desc: Tag system helps you find people with the same hobbies.

f5.title: Continuous Learning
f5.desc: The algorithm evolves based on your preferences.

f6.title: Match Magic
f6.desc: Get notified instantly when someone sparks with you.

s2.title: Profile
s2.desc: Add photos and tell your story.

s3.title: Explore
s3.desc: Like profiles that catch your eye.

footer.desc: Connecting hearts through technology. Find your spark anywhere, anytime.

login_form.title: Login to your account
login_form.description: Enter your username or email below to login to your account

sections.photos_desc: Add 2 to 4 photos to stand out.

form.title: Set New Password
form.subtitle: Please enter your new password below.

team_page.subtitle: We are a trio of passionate engineers obsessed with clean code, scalable architecture, and building products that bring people together.

volodymyr.name: Volodymyr Bondarchuk
volodymyr.role: Full-stack web developer, Auth & Profiles Systems
volodymyr.bio: A specialist in secure infrastructure and user identity. Volodymyr architected the core authentication systems and dynamic profile management of Spark. With a focus on data integrity and seamless onboarding, he ensures that every user's journey starts with a secure, robust, and lightning-fast experience.

maxim.name: Maxim Naiduik
maxim.bio: The algorithmic mastermind behind Spark's matching logic. Maxim specializes in developing complex recommendation engines that process user preferences into meaningful connections. By bridging the gap between data science and full-stack execution, he ensures our users find high-compatibility matches with pinpoint accuracy.

nazar.name: Nazar Kholonivets
nazar.role: Full-stack web developer, Chats & Real-time Systems
nazar.bio: The expert in low-latency communication and real-time interactivity. Nazar engineered the high-concurrency chat architecture and instant notification systems using advanced WebSocket technology. His work ensures that every interaction on the platform happens in real-time, making digital connections feel instant and alive.

empty_state.title: No profiles left
empty_state.desc_likes: You haven't received any new likes yet. Keep swiping!
empty_state.desc_discover: You've seen everyone nearby. Try adjusting your search settings or check back later.
empty_state.more_matches_desc: Try expanding your search distance. You are currently looking within {{maxDistance}} km.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.desc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. All your matches, messages, and photos will be permanently deleted.
danger.warning: This action is irreversible. Enter your password to confirm deletion.
